# Upstream Comprehensive Fixture

Generated with upstream `tk` on 2026-05-29 to cover a broader compatibility
surface than the small basic fixture.

This fixture includes:

- all core ticket types: epic, feature, bug, task, chore;
- priorities 0 through 4;
- statuses open, in_progress, and closed;
- parent relationships;
- dependencies, including a cycle;
- symmetric links;
- tags, assignee, external-ref, design, acceptance, description, and notes.
